summary: Iteration 9: Implant Selection feature testing completed - 22/22 tests passed (100%). All 8 requested features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Implant library endpoints correctly require authentication (returns 403 without token)
GET /api/implant-library/systems returns 18 unique brand+system pairs from 72 implant records
GET /api/implant-library/suggest correctly applies clinical rules for diameter/length recommendations based on bone measurements
clinical_guidance contains all expected fields: bone_width, bone_height, recommended_diameter_range, recommended_length_range, length_category, max_implant_diameter, safety_note
Fallback wider search implemented when no exact matches found (±0.5mm diameter, ±2mm length)
all_options always returns all implants for the selected brand/system for user reference
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests use existing 72-record implant library with 18 systems.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Implant selection feature fully tested. GET /api/implant-library/systems returns 18 unique brand+system pairs. GET /api/implant-library/suggest with Nobel Biocare/NobelActive system returns 4 implant options. Clinical rules working correctly: small bone (4mm) -> 3.0-3.5mm diameter, large bone (8mm) -> 4.5-6.0mm diameter. Length categories: <8mm -> Insufficient, 8-10mm -> Short, 10-13mm -> Standard, >=13mm -> Long. Existing procedure workflow (login, create, approve) confirmed working.

tested_features.1_get_systems_returns_unique_pairs: PASS - GET /api/implant-library/systems returns 18 unique brand+system pairs
tested_features.2_suggest_nobel_biocare_nobelactive_7x13: PASS - Returns recommendations with Nobel Biocare/NobelActive, bone 7mm x 13mm
tested_features.3_suggest_small_bone_4x8_narrow_diameter: PASS - Small bone (4mm x 8mm) returns narrow diameter range 3.0-3.5mm
tested_features.4_suggest_large_bone_8x15_wide_diameter: PASS - Large bone (8mm x 15mm) returns wide diameter range 4.5-6.0mm
tested_features.5_suggest_clinical_guidance_all_fields: PASS - clinical_guidance contains all expected fields
tested_features.6_suggest_returns_all_options: PASS - all_options returns all implants for selected system
tested_features.7_existing_workflow_still_works: PASS - Login, procedures list, dashboard stats all working

clinical_rules_verified.safety_clearance: 1.5mm on each side of implant, 2mm from nerve/sinus

notes: All 8 features from requirements verified. Implant library has 72 records across 18 systems (including Nobel Biocare/NobelActive, Straumann/BLT, Neodent/GM Helix Acqua, Megagen/AnyRidge, etc.). The suggest endpoint correctly applies clinical rules and provides fallback wider search when no exact matches are found.
